sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt32);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id > 1);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 5 WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 4);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table) AS subquery);
